data.title: Sam Bankman-Fried refutes FTX collapse as fraud, claims liquidity crisis. FTX repaying customers 119%-143% of claims. Legal fees around $1B drained estate.
data.description: Sam Bankman-Fried is disputing what he views as common misunderstandings surrounding FTX's downfall, stating that the exchange encountered a liquidity crisis rather than insolvency or fraudulent activities. Bankman-Fried defended FTX's financial state at the time of filing for bankruptcy, asserting that customer funds were not lost permanently. He mentioned that the company is currently reimbursing customers at rates ranging from 119% to 143% of their claims. Bankman-Fried suggested that FTX had the capacity to reimburse customers in assets but was forced into bankruptcy prematurely. He revealed that approximately $1 billion in legal fees have been incurred, depleting the company's assets as attorneys dismantled FTX and supervised the reimbursement process.

data.title: Inventor from London, ON invents the BEST VIEW screen protector/magnifier combo, improving phone screen viewing.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 20, 2026, an inventor from London, Ontario, Canada, shared his inspiration for creating the BEST VIEW, which combines a magnifier with a screen protector in one innovative product. The inventor believed in the need for a more convenient solution and designed the BEST VIEW to provide users with an improved viewing experience on their phone screens. This product aims to offer enhanced visibility and functionality in a single, user-friendly device.

data.title: Liquid Networx offers dedicated Fortinet engineers for enterprise clients, as a Fortinet Engage Preferred Services Partner.
data.description: San Antonio-based Liquid Networx, a national Fortinet partner, has become the inaugural Fortinet Engage Preferred Services Partner (EPSP) in North America. They are introducing a new service providing dedicated and certified Fortinet engineers for enterprise customers. This service offers specialized assistance in designing, implementing, and providing continuous support for Fortinet solutions like SASE, Zero Trust, and the Fortinet Security Fabric. The EPSP program recognizes partners with proven capabilities and expertise in service delivery.

data.title: Indonesia and Trump seal trade deal, setting tariffs at 19% as part of an agreement signed after negotiations.
data.description: An agreement that was reached last year has now been formalized by the countries involved. Indonesia has managed to avoid a tariff increase and has agreed to collaborate on export controls with the other nations.

data.title: CoreWeave stock (CRWV) drops 10% as financing failure for the $4 billion data center in Pennsylvania is reported, linked to Blue Owl Capital's (OWL) funding shortfall.
data.description: CoreWeave, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWV) saw a significant drop of around 10% in its shares on Friday due to a report indicating a major infrastructure setback. The stock price of CRWV is currently declining. This decline is linked to the failure of Blue Owl Capital, Inc. (NYSE: OWL), a crucial financing partner for the AI sector, to secure sufficient funding for a data center project in Pennsylvania. The project was meant to serve as a flagship facility, with CoreWeave spearheading the design of the $4 billion joint venture site to establish one of the largest AI-focused data centers in the United States. Their aim was to utilize a GPU-as-a-service model to address the surging demand for computing power. This news closely follows Blue Owl's announcement on Thursday, which... More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Travelzoo offers club members in Canada new Club Offers on travel deals, including a $999 4-night getaway to Dublin.
data.description: Travelzoo® (NASDAQ: TZOO) has unveiled multiple exclusive Club Offers for their members in Canada, including a 4-night getaway to Dublin for $999. The package includes flights and allows travelers to explore the vibrant culture of Ireland. The company has rigorously vetted and negotiated these deals to provide unparalleled experiences for travel enthusiasts.
